findings.problem: The implemented schema still contains old verification-policy wording that conflicts with the new verifier-subagent-first contract.
findings.evidence: openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/schema.yaml:190-193 still says 'Codex local review and Gemini-driven openspec-artifact-verify'; openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/schema.yaml:229-235 still defines LIGHT/STANDARD/STRICT in terms of 'Codex pre-review' and 'Gemini-based' verification instead of verifier-subagent-first review with tier-gated Gemini second opinion.
findings.recommendation: Update the remaining schema review-gate and risk-tier-gating text so it consistently describes verifier-subagent-first review, shared sequence verify-sequence/default, and Gemini as mandatory only for STRICT or explicitly dual-gated checkpoints.

findings.problem: Workflow execution skills still instruct the old 'Codex local review first, Gemini-based verification second' contract, which can reintroduce the deprecated flow during apply and repair.
findings.evidence: .codex/skills/openspec-apply-change/SKILL.md:107-109 still says 'Do not skip the Codex local review before a Gemini verification task'; .codex/skills/openspec-repair-change/SKILL.md:19-21, 47-49, 97-109 still talk about 'Codex local review' and 'Gemini-based' reruns instead of verifier-subagent review plus tier-gated Gemini second opinion.
findings.recommendation: Refactor apply and repair skills to reference verify-sequence/default, verifier-subagent local review, optional-or-mandatory Gemini second opinion by policy, and the normalized findings contract without reverting to Codex-self-review wording.

findings.problem: Artifact-generation helper skills still teach the superseded verification contract, so newly generated ai-enforced-workflow artifacts can drift back to the old model.
findings.evidence: .codex/skills/openspec-propose/SKILL.md:101, .codex/skills/openspec-ff-change/SKILL.md:92, and .codex/skills/openspec-continue-change/SKILL.md:116 still instruct 'Codex local review first, Gemini independent verification second'.
findings.recommendation: Update propose, ff-change, and continue-change guidance to reference verifier-subagent-first review, shared sequence verify-sequence/default, and tier-gated Gemini second opinion so future generated artifacts match the new workflow.
